title: ZJP Enrichment Output Contract
description: Schema contract between enrich-jobs.js (producer) and backend pipeline.ts (consumer). Both systems MUST agree on field names and types. Changes require updating both sides.

enricher_version.description: Enricher version that produced this record

sponsors_visa.description: LCA + description analysis — does company sponsor visas

possible_sponsor.description: Weaker visa signal — company may sponsor. Absent in records before v37 — backend treats as null.

visa_question_present.description: Does application form ask about visa status

experience_level.description: Experience level from tags (entry_level, mid_level, etc.)

experience_level_from_desc.description: Experience level extracted from job description text. Absent before v36 — backend treats as null.

has_description.description: Whether a job description was available for enrichment. Absent before v36.
has_description.consumer_field: used for filtering (jobs without description dropped in pipeline step 5)

min_degree.description: Minimum degree requirement (bachelors, masters, phd, etc.). Absent before v36 — backend treats as null.

min_degree_source.description: How min_degree was determined (extracted, inferred, etc.)

question_count.description: Number of questions in application form

title.description: Job title (copied from source for reference)

company_name.description: Company name (copied from source for reference)

job_city.description: Job city (copied from source for reference)

job_state.description: Job state (copied from source for reference)

url.description: Job URL (copied from source for reference)

posted_at.description: Posted date (copied from source for reference)

change_log.description: Initial contract — documents current state of enriched_jobs.json output (23 fields, 9 consumed by backend)

change_rules.adding_fields: Safe — consumer ignores unknown fields. Add to contract and update enricher_version.
change_rules.removing_fields: Breaking — MUST check consumer_reads first. If consumer_reads=true, coordinate with backend before removing.
change_rules.renaming_fields: Breaking — MUST update both producer and consumer simultaneously. Use contract test to verify.
change_rules.type_changes: Breaking — MUST update both sides. Null promotions (string -> string|null) are safe. Restrictive changes (string -> enum) need consumer update.
